footer.tagline: Take back control of your money. LIBERIA helps you rebuild your financial stability, one step at a time.
footer.disclaimer: LIBERIA is a personal piloting tool. Nothing shown here constitutes financial, tax or investment advice.

hero.badge: A new generation of financial piloting
hero.subtitle: LIBERIA helps you understand your finances, lower your stress and build durable stability — without jargon, without shame.
hero.trustSignal: 14 days free · Encrypted data · No ads

problem.title: Money shouldn't be a constant source of stress.

overwhelmed.title: You feel overwhelmed by your finances
overwhelmed.text: Scattered accounts, fuzzy spending, tight month-ends — it's mentally exhausting.

chasing.title: You feel like you're chasing money
chasing.text: You work hard but you can't tell where it actually goes.

direction.title: You have no clear direction
direction.text: You want to move forward, but without a tangible plan every month looks like the last.

solution.title: A calm, readable financial compass, built for humans.
solution.description: LIBERIA brings together your money, your spending and your goals in a single premium interface. You see where you stand, what's weighing you down, and the next concrete step.

score.title: Financial stability score
score.text: A transparent score out of 100 that sums up your balance: income, expenses, savings, emergency fund.

goals.title: Goals that actually matter
goals.text: Emergency fund, debt repayment, first project. Tracked simply, without toxic gamification.

budget.title: Clear monthly budget
budget.text: Your income and expenses sorted automatically by category, with no intrusive bank connection.

leftover.title: Real take-home money
leftover.text: You instantly know what's left after the essentials — and how much you can put aside.

howItWorks.title: Three calm steps to take charge again.

one.title: You map it out
one.text: 5 minutes to describe your situation, your income and your main expenses.

two.title: We compute your stability
two.text: Score, take-home money, stress level, emergency fund — everything becomes legible.

three.title: You move forward step by step
three.text: Concrete goals, month after month, without pressure. You catch your breath.

features.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

budget.title: Full budget tracking
budget.text: Income, expenses, essential or pleasure categories.

goals.title: Financial goals
goals.text: Create and track your priorities in a few taps.

savings.title: Piloted savings
savings.text: Your take-home money becomes a real decision variable.

demo.title: Rich demo mode
demo.text: Try everything, without signing up, with realistic data.

coach.title: AI coach included
coach.text: An assistant who understands your numbers and answers without jargon.

security.title: Your data is yours. Period.
security.description: Encrypted storage, strict per-user access via Supabase Row-Level Security, no resale, no ads. LIBERIA doesn't need your bank passwords.

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.text: TLS connection and encrypted storage at rest.

rls.title: Supabase RLS
rls.text: Each user only sees their own data.

noAggregation.title: No bank aggregation
noAggregation.text: You stay in control of what you enter, with no intrusive middleman.

free.a: You start with a 14-day free trial (card required to activate). After the trial, your chosen subscription kicks in automatically: 14.99 CHF/month or 119.99 CHF/year. You can cancel any time from your account, no questions asked.

cancelTrial.q: What happens if I cancel during the trial?
cancelTrial.a: No charge. Your access continues until the end of the 14 days, then your account goes on pause — your data stays safe and you can reactivate whenever you want.

payment.a: Visa, Mastercard and American Express cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, plus TWINT (Switzerland, depending on Stripe Dashboard activation). Everything is handled by Stripe — encrypted and PCI-compliant.

bank.q: Is my data connected to my bank?
bank.a: No. LIBERIA works with manual entry to keep you 100% in control. It's mentally healthier and substantially safer.

audience.a: Anyone who wants to get back on their feet financially — from a tight salary to a freelancer who wants to clarify the year, including people in financial recovery.

ai.a: The AI coach is already included: you can discuss your situation, ask for a 30, 60 or 90-day financial plan, and get recommendations matched to your real numbers. No banking data required — you talk to it like to someone who knows your file.

pricingPreview.title: {days} days free. Then the plan of your choice.
pricingPreview.subtitle: Card required to start. Automatic renewal after the trial. Cancel any time.

cta.subtitle: Create your account in 30 seconds — or explore demo mode without signing up.
